title: mentha × dalmatica var. cinerascens
intro: Mentha × dalmatica var. cinerascens is a variety of the Dalmatian pennyroyal plant, a hybrid mint native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily for its carminative, antispasmodic, and antimicrobial effects, which can help alleviate digestive issues, ease muscle cramps, and combat infections. The health benefits of Mentha × dalmatica var. cinerascens include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory function, and acting as a natural insect repellent. This plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, essential oil, or tincture, with the latter often used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as menstrual cramps and indigestion.
